query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_deals,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'won' THEN 1 END) as won_deals,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'lost' THEN 1 END) as lost_deals,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'open' THEN 1 END) as open_deals,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN utmSource IS NOT NULL AND utmSource != '' THEN 1 END) as with_utm_source,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN utmMedium IS NOT NULL AND utmMedium != '' THEN 1 END) as with_utm_medium,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN utmCampaign IS NOT NULL AND utmCampaign != '' THEN 1 END) as with_utm_campaign,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN utmTerm IS NOT NULL AND utmTerm != '' THEN 1 END) as with_utm_term,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN utmContent IS NOT NULL AND utmContent != '' THEN 1 END) as with_utm_content,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN leadSource IS NOT NULL AND leadSource != '' THEN 1 END) as with_lead_source,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN channelOrigin IS NOT NULL AND channelOrigin != '' THEN 1 END) as with_channel_origin
FROM deals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND tenantId = 1;
